title: JoinBandClient — Invite Link Band Join Flow
problem: Most users arrive in Odio as joiners — they received an invite link from a band creator. The join flow must be frictionless: one tap to join, then immediately into the band's session list. No Drive authorization needed for joiners (they don't upload).
analysis:
JoinBandClient renders the joiner first-run screen: band name at top, 'Join [Band Name]' amber primary button, brief description 'You've been invited to join this band's recording sessions.'

On 'Join': POST /api/bands/[bandId]/join with the invite token. On success: router.push to band session list. On error (invalid token, already a member, token expired): error message inline.

The invite token is in the URL (/invite/[token]) and was stored in a session cookie through the OAuth redirect flow. JoinBandClient reads the token from the URL or cookie.
successCriteria:
- Renders band name and 'Join [Band Name]' button
- Button tap: POST to join endpoint, navigates to session list on success
- Error states: 'Invalid invite link', 'Already a member', 'Invite has expired'
- No Drive authorization step (joiners are MEMBER or EDITOR role — no drive.file scope requested)
- Loading state on join button while POST in-flight
implementation: components/bands/JoinBandClient.tsx: 'use client'. Props { bandName, bandId, inviteToken }. Internal: joining (bool), error (string|null). On join: POST /api/bands/[bandId]/members { inviteToken } → router.push(/bands/[bandId]).

decisions.decision: Joiners are not prompted for Drive scope
decisions.rationale: Audio upload and Drive access belong to the Recorder's account only. Joiners (Editor/Member) never upload audio. Requesting drive.file from joiners is unnecessary and increases friction — it adds an extra OAuth consent screen for a permission they'll never use.
decisions.recommendation: Invite flow: sign in with profile+email scope only. No drive.file. Drive scope is only requested from band creators (Recorder role) during first-run.

knownLimitations: Invite tokens are single-use or time-limited — expired tokens show an error with no way to request a new one from this screen
userGuide: When you follow a band invite link, you'll see the band name and a Join button. Tap it to get immediate access to the band's sessions and clips.
